rationale: Educ. Code §38.030 governs traumatic injury response protocols and bleeding control stations in schools. It has no fiscal or operational connection to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount.
quote: Each school district and open-enrollment charter school shall develop and annually make available a protocol for school employees and volunteers to follow in the event of a traumatic injury.
_note: No conflict. The rule concerns school safety protocols, not property tax exemptions or school funding mechanisms.
